instruction: Create an actor that on overlap sets IsActive to true, sets Score to 0, sets Health to 100, prints Game Started, and destroys itself, all in order

VAR IsActive: Bool = false
VAR Score: Int = 0
VAR Health: Float = 100.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: SetVar [Variable=IsActive, Value=true]
NODE n3: SetVar [Variable=Score, Value=0]
NODE n4: SetVar [Variable=Health, Value=100.0]
NODE n5: PrintString [InString="Game Started"]
NODE n6: DestroyActor

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute

instruction: Create an actor with an IsAlive boolean. On overlap, check IsAlive. If true, print Still Alive and subtract 10 from Health. If false, print Already Dead
expected_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: BP_AliveCheck
PARENT: Actor

VAR IsAlive: Bool = true
VAR Health: Float = 100.0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=IsAlive]
NODE n3: Branch
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Still Alive"]
NODE n5: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n6: SubtractFloat [B=10.0]
NODE n7: SetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n8: PrintString [InString="Already Dead"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.True -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n3.False -> n8.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n3.Condition [Bool]
DATA n5.Value -> n6.A [Float]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Value [Float]

instruction: Create an actor that on BeginPlay gets Health, subtracts Damage from it, stores the result back in Health, then checks if Health is less than or equal to zero, and if so prints Dead

VAR Health: Float = 100.0
VAR Damage: Float = 25.0

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: GetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n3: GetVar [Variable=Damage]
NODE n4: SubtractFloat
NODE n5: SetVar [Variable=Health]
NODE n6: LessThanOrEqual [B=0.0]
NODE n7: Branch
NODE n8: PrintString [InString="Dead"]

EXEC n5.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.True -> n8.Execute

DATA n2.Value -> n4.A [Float]
DATA n3.Value -> n4.B [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.Value [Float]
DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n6.A [Float]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Condition [Bool]
